'''Quarmall''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A controversial Master, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] censured him for taking the entire [[Bergruutfa Clan]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. While thought dead when he encountered [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] during the war, however Quarmall survived and fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and was trained as a [[Dark side adept/Legends|adept]] by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]].

==Biography==
===Separatist Crisis===
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]], Quarmall was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually taking on the mantle of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after constructing a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Master Quarmall took on several missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] during his career, partnering with Jedi [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]] and [[Tassida Judrelle]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Together, the three Jedi dismantled a [[Salt/Legends|salt]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] cartel on [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] and arrested fifteen smugglers, including cartel kingpin [[Lojrak Shrag]].<ref name="hnn">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|regional/1359_2.html|Arconan Smuggling Cartel Dismantled}}</ref>

===The Clone Wars===
[[File:QuarmallDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Quarmall is thought gunned down by [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s.]]
When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Quarmall took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Taking up stewardship of the [[Bergruutfa Clan|Bergruufta]] [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] of [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]], Master Quarmall came under fire from the High Council after he claimed to have taken the ten Initiates as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] in direct defiance of the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]].<ref name="CSWE" />

While escorting his Padawans aboard a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mon Calamari capital ship (Clone Wars)|capital ship]], the vessel was boarded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and an army of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s. Quarmall engaged the group of droids, he was overpowered and shot several times.<ref name="GG" /> Leaving the Jedi Master for dead, Grievous confiscated the Abyssin's lightsaber, and captured the clan of Padawans.<ref name="US">{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}}</ref> Due to Master Quarmall's tenacious Abyssin physiology, the Jedi was able to survive the wounds and keep himself alive.

===The New Order===
Sitting out the rest of the war, Master Quarmall was captured by agents of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] who twisted him to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. When the Jedi Order was disbanded by Sidious' alter-ego [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] Palpatine and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] came to power, Quarmall became a sleeper agent for his Imperial Highness.<ref name="CSWE" />

Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Quarmall reemerged, spreading a disingenuous message of interplanetary unity and peace to cause a weakening of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Military]]. His plan was soon foiled by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents and fledgling [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of the [[New Jedi Order|reformed Order]] who exposed his plan to his followers by showing Imperial-coded messages and [[Holovid/Legends|holovids]] of his dark plot. Soon after, they confronted and defeated the [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] in a furious battle.<ref name="SWGS">''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]''</ref>
